code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const App=()=>{const apiBaseUrl=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:5000';const[posts,setPosts]=useState([]);const[title,setTitle]=useState('');const[content,setContent]=useState('');const[authorName,setAuthorName]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');const fetchPosts=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch(`${apiBaseUrl}/api/posts`);if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch posts');}const data=await response.json();setPosts(data);setError('');}catch(err){setError('Could not load posts. Is the backend running?');console.error(err);}finally{setLoading(false);}};useEffect(()=>{fetchPosts();},[]);const handleSubmit=async event=>{event.preventDefault();try{const response=await fetch(`${apiBaseUrl}/api/posts`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({title,content,authorName})});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to create post');}setTitle('');setContent('');setAuthorName('');await fetchPosts();}catch(err){setError('Could not create post.');console.error(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{style:{maxWidth:'720px',margin:'2rem auto',fontFamily:'sans-serif'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Gym Social Media"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Post workouts, updates, and motivation."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,style:{display:'grid',gap:'0.75rem',marginBottom:'2rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Your name",value:authorName,onChange:e=>setAuthorName(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Post title",value:title,onChange:e=>setTitle(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{placeholder:"What did you train today?",value:content,onChange:e=>setContent(e.target.value),required:true,rows:4}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Create Post"})]}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading posts..."}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:error}),!loading&&posts.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No posts yet."}),posts.map(post=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{style:{padding:'1rem',border:'1px solid #ccc',marginBottom:'0.75rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:post.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:post.content}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("small",{children:["by ",post.authorName," on ",new Date(post.createdAt).toLocaleString()]})]},post.id))]});};export default App;
